title: Axiology (Value)
description: What is valuable - quality judgments, trade-offs, worth

full-stack-completeness-value.what: Complete full-stack implementation in single story
full-stack-completeness-value.value: High value - feature immediately usable by end-users
evidence: US-002: Account in 'available' status, ready for production use
US-001: Product in 'upcoming' status, requires follow-up story

static-validation-sufficiency.what: Static validation (TypeScript + API + grep) vs browser testing
static-validation-sufficiency.value: High value when environment blocks browser testing
evidence: US-002: 25/27 ACs validated via static analysis
Zero TypeScript errors proves implementation correctness
API endpoint availability proves integration complete
static-validation-sufficiency.comparison: Static validation sufficient for implementation verification, browser testing validates UX
static-validation-sufficiency.context: When dev server crashes prevent browser testing

full-stack-scope-tradeoff.decision: Include all 4 layers (canonical, data, API, UI) in single story
costs: Longer execution time (~1.5 hours vs ~30 minutes for partial)
full-stack-scope-tradeoff.rationale: Immediate user value outweighs longer execution time

parallel-execution-tradeoff.decision: Execute independent tasks in parallel vs sequential
